queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account correlates with reduced default probability in consumer credit portfolios.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of default risk: empirical evidence on how maintaining critical or diversified existing credit accounts mitigates loan delinquency rates.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: statistical investigation into how a negative checking account balance influences lower default likelihood in retail lending.
